mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT c.large_category AS value FROM new_purchase_info p INNER JOIN new_product_work_20260510 pr ON pr.id = p.product_id INNER JOIN new_category c ON c.id = pr.category_id ORDER BY c.large_category

SELECT DISTINCT c.medium_category AS value FROM new_purchase_info p INNER JOIN new_product_work_20260510 pr ON pr.id = p.product_id INNER JOIN new_category c ON c.id = pr.category_id WHERE c.large_category = #{largeCategory} ORDER BY c.medium_category

SELECT DISTINCT c.small_category AS value FROM new_purchase_info p INNER JOIN new_product_work_20260510 pr ON pr.id = p.product_id INNER JOIN new_category c ON c.id = pr.category_id WHERE c.large_category = #{largeCategory} AND c.medium_category = #{mediumCategory} ORDER BY c.small_category

if.test: req.largeCategory != null and req.largeCategory != '' and req.largeCategory != 'ALL' and req.largeCategory != '전체'
req.mediumCategory != null and req.mediumCategory != '' and req.mediumCategory != 'ALL' and req.mediumCategory != '전체'
req.smallCategory != null and req.smallCategory != '' and req.smallCategory != 'ALL' and req.smallCategory != '전체'
req.supplierName != null and req.supplierName != '' and req.supplierName != 'ALL' and req.supplierName != '전체'

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM new_purchase_info p INNER JOIN new_product_work_20260510 pr ON pr.id = p.product_id INNER JOIN new_category c ON c.id = pr.category_id

SELECT p.id AS id, c.large_category AS largeCategory, c.medium_category AS mediumCategory, c.small_category AS smallCategory, p.supplier_name AS supplierName, pr.product_name AS productName, p.unit_cost AS unitCost, p.quantity AS quantity, p.total_cost AS totalCost, p.purchase_date AS purchaseDate, p.purchase_time AS purchaseTime, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM new_purchase_info p INNER JOIN new_product_work_20260510 pr ON pr.id = p.product_id INNER JOIN new_category c ON c.id = pr.category_id
ORDER BY p.purchase_date DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{req.limit} OFFSET #{req.offset}
SELECT pr.id FROM new_product_work_20260510 pr WHERE pr.category_id = #{categoryId} AND pr.product_name = #{productName} AND pr.active = 1 ORDER BY pr.updated_at DESC, pr.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE new_purchase_info SET product_id = #{productId}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate}, purchase_time = #{purchaseTime}, quantity = #{quantity}, unit_cost = #{unitCost}, total_cost = #{totalCost}, supplier_name = #{supplierName} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM new_product_work_20260510 pr LEFT JOIN new_category c ON c.id = pr.category_id

SELECT c.large_category AS largeCategory, c.medium_category AS mediumCategory, c.small_category AS smallCategory, pr.product_name AS productName, pr.start_date AS startDate, pr.end_date AS endDate, CASE WHEN pr.active = 1 THEN '활성' ELSE '비활성' END AS activeLabel FROM new_product_work_20260510 pr LEFT JOIN new_category c ON c.id = pr.category_id
ORDER BY pr.updated_at DESC, pr.id DESC LIMIT #{req.limit} OFFSET #{req.offset}
